notes: Three search piles at Le Roulant: the roulette table (chips, tokens), the cashier cage (books, keys, the rotary phone), and the slot bank (the bachelor party's debris).

the_house_marker.label: The house marker (1924)
the_house_marker.flavor: Brass token from the building's bank era — Le Roulant was the Crescent Trust before the war. Worn smooth on the eagle side. You found it the day you bought in.

the_orphaned_chip.label: An orphan chip ($1000)
the_orphaned_chip.flavor: Under the rim. Maddox put it there a year ago to test the cleaning crew. It is still there.

effects.text: You pick it up. The cage has been one chip short on the $1000 rack since last June.

a_torn_betting_slip.label: A torn betting slip
a_torn_betting_slip.flavor: Tomorrow morning's columns, in Antoine's small hand. He has, since '99, been writing the next session's plays before he goes home.

the_float_ledger.label: The float ledger
the_float_ledger.flavor: Maroon binder. The week's takings. The half-sheets you sign at the cage. Tonight's column is light by $400 at 11:11 and you have written that figure in pencil at the bottom of the page.

the_house_pen.label: The house pen
the_house_pen.flavor: Black Sheaffer. Mickey's. The one he signs the half-sheets with. The cap has been chewed.

the_loyalty_card_for_antoine.label: Antoine's loyalty card
the_loyalty_card_for_antoine.flavor: He doesn't keep his own. The cage keeps it for him. Two hundred and four Fridays punched.

a_paper_cup_of_cherries.label: A paper cup of cherries
a_paper_cup_of_cherries.flavor: Bachelor party. Maraschino. Half-eaten. Set on top of the orange slot.

the_lemon_pull_token.label: The lemon-pull token
the_lemon_pull_token.flavor: From the third slot. The token spins out when the slot pays a third lemon. The bachelor party left one on the cabinet.

the_jackpot_polaroid_2019.label: The 2019 jackpot Polaroid
the_jackpot_polaroid_2019.flavor: Pinned to the bulletin board behind the slot bank. The previous owner's wife and a man with a $42,000 ticket. The wife is in red. The man is in tears. The board is faded except where the Polaroid covers it.
